title: Rainy Convenience Store
source_text: A rainy night, a convenience store, an unexpected meeting, and a quiet ending when the rain finally softens.

continuity_rules: future assets must preserve the same identity

scene_cards.visual: Rainy street outside a convenience store, heroine seen from behind under neon.
scene_cards.voiceover: That night, the rain felt like it could hide the whole city.
scene_cards.music_cue: low suspense bed with rain texture

scene_cards.visual: Inside the store, cold and warm light split two figures across the shelf.
scene_cards.voiceover: I did not expect to meet him there.

asset_goal.scene: store interior with cold warm contrast

scene_cards.visual: They walk out together as the rain thins and the sky starts to lift.
scene_cards.voiceover: Some meetings are already an answer by themselves.
